textByHash.047866f8c001494bc35ebf1606c7898046c11202: I'll grab you later when you're not busy helping someone else.
textByHash.08be493625725984b1adf6f8c157ca967e57a5cd: Ahh well they make it less likely that you'll accidently attack anyone wearing the same cape as you and easier to attack everyone else. They also make it easier to distinguish people who're wearing the same cape as you
textByHash.123cfbd0bc01ad253a4811850a9ca0691b590048: So would you like to buy one?
textByHash.1b9b3d8dc871c9b7e5028b351b47d0db8ad26d9c: Choose the type of game and then choose the option you want such as time per move.
textByHash.1dd022b5a27a417564f3e02b4c3749298930b05c: Thanks for finding the book. I'll have to think up what I need next.
textByHash.349933cb9261298ba3ccc931ed9caed71c77ce96: Once you have finished your game you will go back to the challenge room here where you can challenge again! We also have tables in a few pubs around the world!
textByHash.39417a5404bbae01e11ec5a92ba009bd8d9a8171: Thanks, I'll get on with reading it. Meanwhile, you can have this other book of mine - I won't be wanting to read it again.
textByHash.563ef9d92018e900853e53d19f1249d66270c054: If you opponent accepts the challenge you will be taken to one of the tables around where you will play your game of choice.
textByHash.565780375a0d37411bdd3a3f9762ba05cc135d34: Yep, the aim is to have more of your runes on the board than your opponent. You can take your opponents pieces by trapping them between your own.
textByHash.60f0b6f2fd084a387106443ba9261ca401a35deb: I'm afraid I don't sell drinks.
textByHash.6216d10d683e254c99133d1a354a158d84813af1: Yup, you have to get four runes in row.
textByHash.711537217df3da2c4d192dbc72bc51a32127e705: I don't want to run out of stuff to talk about with the other sailors, so I'm doing plenty of background reading before we sail. Will you find my book, please?
textByHash.7b1f1cb44dbc56baa2a926514a20f03fdcf3b92a: Have you found my book yet? ''
textByHash.862316c458b70c1e58b095394824bbeaf0b45fe3: Welcome to the Burthorpe Games Rooms!
textByHash.8ceaeb86f8b0d99f10a0dbe61e3a27daa361206d: I'm about to join the crew of a cargo ship, trading goods with the eastern lands. I hear our voyages can last for weeks, especially if the winds are slack.
textByHash.a40c1aca8cacc9931a665f874e1045d06509992d: from everyone else. They're very useful when out in the wilderness with friends or anyone else you don't want to harm.
textByHash.a9d74092658630e7756901d5db0d76474bdcd292: Hello there, are you interested in buying one of my special capes?
textByHash.b4abc05b62adfdc4cc60e77514237bd5c9ad1d44: You can someone to a game anywhere in the Games Zone (except on a PvP or Deadman world) by using the right click option.
textByHash.c14904b26ecfb29073aa8124df0798b80d490fe7: Can you help me find a book I want? That snotty Arceuus Librarian won't even say hello, never mind actually helping me.
textByHash.c3e8feb6a0fa20736aea09cd76c94c8b46003585: Draughts uses standard rules, apart from: a draw is declared if no piece has been taken or promoted for forty moves.
textByHash.d788985a14e533c7e402c8a7f6dd3511b9559fa6: Yes, you take it in turns to add a line with the goal of making squares. Everytime you make a square you take another turn.
textByHash.d8afb38bf56d0d00cc6e0a699291674834f50eaf: Currently we offer Draughts, Runelink, Runesquares, and Runeversi.
textByHash.ddb1db87688f7f4e33d49104879098af12a1bdaf: I think I'd like to read: ''
textByHash.f6d45f627dc8ca302cb64da35e84329fed4b5513: It's just typical of the Arceuus snobs that their Librarian's too good to help customers like me. They ought to be grateful to you for doing her job for her.
